name: apolo-dynamic-flow
description: Plugin de orquestacion de agentes para OpenCode. Agnostico al lenguaje. Flujos dinamicos, recoleccion hibrida, planes con 3 modos, tests automaticos, absorcion de tools externas, routing declarativo, atomic writes, file locks, allowlist, secret detection, hash chain, multi-level impact prediction, code quality, test coverage, LSP, self-healing, test generation, semantic search, refactoring, LLM bridge (MiniMax/OpenAI compatible).

scripts.test:all: npm run test:python && npm run test:atomic && npm run test:security && npm run test:quality && npm run test:intelligence && npm run test
